_comment: A3 gate provenance — the drift tripwire between extracted lib/gates modules and the live n8n baseline they were pulled from. Each module pins the sha256_live of its SOURCE node at baseline versionId c91917bb. .ci/check-gate-provenance.js recomputes those source hashes and FAILS if any drifted, signalling the extracted module must be re-reviewed against the changed source. Live-node stamp (making the SM call these modules) is A3.4 tooling, PO-gated. sha256_live = first 16 hex of sha256(unredacted node file).

lib/gates/mtf.js.note: MTF confluence + F1-B shadow (G22: engine verdict alone, floor <40).

lib/gates/backtest.js.note: BACKTEST_ENFORCEMENT + F2 PF shadow; tier select; FAIL-CLOSED UNKNOWN.

lib/gates/composite_opposition.js.note: Entry-quality second-opinion veto (>=2 of 7 opposing sources).

lib/gates/ai_conflict.js.note: Entry-quality AI-conflict guard (hard never waived; paper soft-allow).
